name: FaceOffset
summary: Service for offset of faces of the element

constructors.name: FaceOffset
constructors.signature: FaceOffset(inputPolyhedron: Polyhedron3D) | FaceOffset(inputPolyhedron: Polyhedron3D, faceIndices: VecSizeTList) | FaceOffset(inputBRep: BRep3D) | FaceOffset(inputBRep: BRep3D, faceIndices: VecSizeTList) | FaceOffset(element: FaceOffset)

params.name: inputPolyhedron
params.doc: polyhedron to execute face offset/shell on

methods.name: IsResultBrep
methods.summary: returns if selected object has brep geometry
methods.remarks: returns if selected object has brep geometry

methods.name: Offset
methods.signature: Offset( offsetDistance: float, direction: eFaceOffsetDirection, useOffsetStepPierce: bool, useOrthoVXSplit: bool, punchDirection: Vector3D | None = None, ) -> tuple[eGeometryErrorCode, Any, Any]

params.name: direction
params.doc: offset direction 0 - in face normal direction, 1 - in both directions, 2 - opposite to face normal

params.name: useOffsetStepPierce
params.doc: if to use offset step pierce

returns.doc: tuple(eOK if success, first resulting geometry, second resulting geometry, set only if offset in both direction is performed)

methods.name: Shell
methods.signature: Shell( offsetDistance: float, direction: eFaceOffsetDirection, useOffsetStepPierce: bool, useOrthoVXSplit: bool, punchDirection: Vector3D | None = None, ) -> tuple[eGeometryErrorCode, Any]

params.name: direction
params.doc: offset direction 0 - in face normal direction, 1 - in both directions, 2 - opposite to face normal

params.name: useOffsetStepPierce
params.doc: if to use offset step pierce
